_comment: Revert selector → user-facing message map for Give Protocol frontend. Generated from GiveVault4626, PayoutRouter, CampaignRegistry, ACLManager.
_usage: Decode the revert selector from the error bytes (first 4 bytes), look up here, display the message to the user.

0x356680b7.name: ERC4626ExceededMaxRedeem
0x356680b7.devNote: owner has fewer shares than requested

0x8baa579f.name: InsufficientCash
0x8baa579f.userMessage: Vault is rebalancing — please try again shortly.
0x8baa579f.devNote: vault cash < needed, adapter divest failed to cover shortfall

0x5a2e4757.name: ExcessiveLoss
0x5a2e4757.userMessage: Withdrawal paused — slippage too high. Try a smaller amount or wait.
0x5a2e4757.devNote: divest returned less than maxLossBps threshold

0xd93c0665.name: EnforcedPause
0xd93c0665.devNote: contract is in paused state (non-emergency or emergency within grace period)

0x6f9a9e09.name: GracePeriodExpired
0x6f9a9e09.userMessage: Emergency recovery period has ended — please contact support.
0x6f9a9e09.devNote: emergency was activated more than 24h ago; normal redeem path closed

0x1f2a2005.name: ZeroAmount
0x1f2a2005.userMessage: Amount must be greater than zero.
0x1f2a2005.devNote: shares or assets param was zero

0x6f32664b.name: GracePeriodActive
0x6f32664b.userMessage: Emergency withdrawal available after 24-hour grace period.

0xd3715e97.name: NotInEmergency
0xd3715e97.userMessage: This action is only available during an emergency.
0xd3715e97.devNote: emergencyWithdrawUser called when not in emergency state

0x45b56078.name: InsufficientAllowance
0x45b56078.userMessage: You don't have permission to withdraw these shares.
0x45b56078.devNote: msg.sender is not owner and has insufficient allowance for emergencyWithdrawUser

0x6b2c38f2.name: SlippageExceeded
0x6b2c38f2.userMessage: Transaction would exceed your slippage limit. Try again with updated parameters.
0x6b2c38f2.devNote: actual shares/assets outside minShares/minAssets/maxShares bounds in ETH convenience methods

0xce3a3d37.name: InvalidConfiguration
0xce3a3d37.userMessage: Vault is not configured for this operation.
0xce3a3d37.devNote: wrappedNative not set, or donationRouter missing in harvest

0x3ddddddd.name: AdapterNotSet
0x3ddddddd.userMessage: Yield strategy not active. Contact protocol admin.
0x3ddddddd.devNote: harvest or emergencyWithdrawFromAdapter called with no active adapter

0x9a208100.name: VaultNotRegistered
0x9a208100.userMessage: This vault is not registered for yield distribution.
0x9a208100.devNote: vault has no associated campaignId in PayoutRouter

0xb94abeec.name: OperationNotAllowed (payoutsHalted)
0xb94abeec.userMessage: Yield claims are currently paused for this campaign.

0x8579befe.name: InvalidBeneficiary
0x8579befe.userMessage: A beneficiary address is required for partial campaign splits.

0x82b42900.name: Unauthorized (PayoutRouter)
0x82b42900.userMessage: You don't have permission to perform this action.
0x82b42900.devNote: role check failed via local AccessControl

0x2d5be4da.name: InsufficientSubmissionDeposit
0x2d5be4da.userMessage: Campaign submission requires a 0.005 ETH deposit.

0xdce7fa76.name: CampaignAlreadyExists
0xdce7fa76.userMessage: A campaign with this ID already exists.

0x04f3e10a.name: InvalidCampaignStatus
0x04f3e10a.userMessage: This action is not available for the campaign's current status.
